hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】美联储分歧导致 ETF 资金外流持续三天，比特币“陷入”关键阻力位下方；【CRYPTO】Ark Invest 购买了价值 3900 万美元的 Robinhood 股票，并出售了价值 600 万美元的现货比特币 ETF；【FINANCE】美联储维持利率稳定，但反对声音达到1992年以来最高水平。

items.title: Bitcoin ‘trapped below’ key resistance level as ETF outflows stretch to three days amid Fed split
items.summary: Analysts focused less on the pause itself and more on the Fed’s unusually deep split amid ongoing bitcoin ETF outflows and weak demand.
items.title_zh: 美联储分歧导致 ETF 资金外流持续三天，比特币“陷入”关键阻力位下方
items.summary_zh: 分析师较少关注暂停本身，而更多地关注美联储在比特币 ETF 持续流出和需求疲软的情况下异常严重的分歧。

items.title: Ark Invest buys $39 million worth of Robinhood shares, offloads $6 million of its own spot bitcoin ETF
items.summary: Robinhood's stock closed down 13.2% after the company reported weaker first-quarter earnings the previous day.
items.title_zh: Ark Invest 购买了价值 3900 万美元的 Robinhood 股票，并出售了价值 600 万美元的现货比特币 ETF
items.summary_zh: Robinhood 前一天公布第一季度盈利疲软后，该公司股价收盘下跌 13.2%。

items.title: Fed holds rates steady but with highest level of dissent since 1992
items.summary: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday released its latest decision on interest rates.
items.title_zh: 美联储维持利率稳定，但反对声音达到1992年以来最高水平
items.summary_zh: 美联储周三公布了最新的利率决定。

items.title: Tether-backed startup Oobit offers AI bots Visa-supported corporate expense cards
items.summary: Agent Cards will enable AI agents to make purchases using a USDT balance without "requiring a human in every approval loop.”
items.title_zh: Tether 支持的初创公司 Oobit 提供人工智能机器人 Visa 支持的企业费用卡
items.summary_zh: 代理卡将使人工智能代理能够使用 USDT 余额进行购买，而无需“在每个审批循环中都需要人工参与”。

items.title: OpenAI available at FedRAMP Moderate
items.summary: OpenAI is available at FedRAMP Moderate authorization for ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API, enabling secure AI adoption for U.S. federal agencies.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 在 FedRAMP 中可用
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 可通过 FedRAMP 对 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 OpenAI API 进行中等授权，从而为美国联邦机构提供安全的 AI 采用。

items.title: The long con: How North Korean spies spent months in-person to drain $285 million from Drift
items.summary: The security intelligence research firm said North Korean-state-backed hackers account for 76% of all crypto scam and hack losses in 2026 and have stolen $6 billion since 2017.
items.title_zh: 长期骗局：朝鲜间谍如何花费数月时间从 Drift 盗取 2.85 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 这家安全情报研究公司表示，2026 年，朝鲜国家支持的黑客造成了所有加密货币诈骗和黑客损失的 76%，自 2017 年以来已窃取了 60 亿美元。

items.title: The Green Beret was just the start: New data suggests military insider trading crisis on Polymarket
items.summary: New data shows unusually high win rates in defense bets, building on research that 3% of traders drive prices and under 1% capture most profits.
items.title_zh: 绿色贝雷帽只是开始：新数据表明 Polymarket 出现军事内幕交易危机
items.summary_zh: 新数据显示，国防赌注的胜率异常高，研究表明 3% 的交易者推动价格，而不到 1% 的交易者获取大部分利润。

items.title: Bitcoin faces $80,000 resistance as derivatives show signs of risk aversion
items.summary: Bitcoin faces profit-taking pressure near $80,000, backed up by a U.S. inflation report that comes as high oil prices and rising bond yields weigh on risk assets.
items.title_zh: 衍生品出现避险迹象，比特币面临8万美元阻力
items.summary_zh: 在美国通胀报告的支撑下，比特币面临接近 80,000 美元的获利了结压力，而该报告的背景是高油价和不断上升的债券收益率给风险资产带来压力。

items.title: Enabling privacy-preserving AI training on everyday devices
items.summary: A new method could bring more accurate and efficient AI models to high-stakes applications like health care and finance, even in under-resourced settings.
items.title_zh: 在日常设备上启用保护隐私的人工智能训练
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以为医疗保健和金融等高风险应用带来更准确、更高效的人工智能模型，即使在资源贫乏的环境中也是如此。

items.title: Jacob Andreas and Brett McGuire named Edgerton Award winners
items.summary: The associate professors of EECS and chemistry, respectively, are honored for exceptional contributions to teaching, research, and service at MIT.
items.title_zh: 雅各布·安德烈亚斯和布雷特·麦奎尔被评为埃哲顿奖获得者
items.summary_zh: EECS 和化学副教授分别因对麻省理工学院的教学、研究和服务做出的杰出贡献而受到表彰。

items.title: Human-machine teaming dives underwater
items.summary: Researchers are developing hardware and algorithms to improve collaboration between divers and autonomous underwater vehicles engaged in maritime missions.
items.title_zh: 人机协作潜入水下
items.summary_zh: 研究人员正在开发硬件和算法，以改善潜水员和执行海上任务的自主水下航行器之间的协作。

items.title: Jerome Powell says he will continue to serve as a Fed governor, calls Trump criticism 'unprecedented'
items.summary: Powell addressed the question of whether he will stay on as a Board of Governors member after his term as chair ends.
items.title_zh: 杰罗姆·鲍威尔表示，他将继续担任美联储理事，称特朗普的批评“史无前例”
items.summary_zh: 鲍威尔谈到了在主席任期结束后是否继续担任理事会成员的问题。

items.title: PayPal's new CEO makes Venmo a standalone business unit as potential buyers circle
items.summary: PayPal is betting that a new corporate structure can reignite growth at a company that has lost ground to Apple, Google and Stripe in the e-commerce battle.
items.title_zh: 随着潜在买家的青睐，PayPal 新任首席执行官将 Venmo 打造为独立业务部门
items.summary_zh: PayPal 认为，新的公司结构可以重新激发这家在电子商务之战中输给苹果、谷歌和 Stripe 的公司的增长。

items.title: Here's what changed in the new Fed statement
items.summary: This is a comparison of Wednesday's Federal Open Market Committee statement with the one issued after the Fed's previous policymaking meeting in March.
items.title_zh: 这是新的美联储声明中的变化
items.summary_zh: 这是周三联邦公开市场委员会声明与美联储 3 月份上一次决策会议后发布的声明的比较。

items.title: Traders brace for $800 billion in earnings-related stock movement
items.summary: Wenesday night is the main event for earnings season, with Alphabet, Amazon, Meta and Microsoft – four of the "Magnificent Seven" — set to report.
items.title_zh: 交易员准备迎接与收益相关的 8000 亿美元的股票走势
items.summary_zh: 周三晚上是财报季的重头戏，Alphabet、亚马逊、Meta 和微软——“七巨头”中的四家——将公布财报。

items.title: Kalshi bettors called it: Powell says he will stay on as Fed governor after chair term ends
items.summary: Bettors on the platform don't think Powell will leave until August. If he stays on until then, he'd attend two more meetings of the FOMC.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希投注者称：鲍威尔表示，他将在主席任期结束后继续担任美联储理事
items.summary_zh: 该平台上的投注者认为鲍威尔要到八月才会离开。如果他留任到那时，他将再参加两次联邦公开市场委员会会议。

items.title: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square USA fund falls sharply in public market debut
items.summary: The listing gives public investors their first direct stake in Ackman's investment platform, which runs a concentrated portfolio of 10 large-cap names.
items.title_zh: 比尔·阿克曼的潘兴广场美国基金在公开市场首次亮相时大幅下跌
items.summary_zh: 此次上市让公众投资者首次直接持有阿克曼投资平台的股份，该平台运营着由 10 家大盘股组成的集中投资组合。

items.title: Oil price hits highest since 2022 after report Trump to be briefed on new Iran options
items.summary: Axios reported that US Central Command has prepared a plan for a wave of "short and powerful" strikes on Iran.
items.title_zh: 特朗普将听取有关伊朗新选择的简报后油价触及2022年以来最高
items.summary_zh: Axios报道称，美国中央司令部已准备好对伊朗进行一波“短暂而有力”的打击的计划。

items.title: Trump says US studying troop cuts in Germany, as spat with Merz intensifies
items.summary: His remarks come after the German chancellor criticised the US approach to the war in Iran.
items.title_zh: 特朗普称美国正在研究削减驻德美军，与默茨的争执加剧
items.summary_zh: 在他发表上述言论之前，德国总理批评了美国对伊朗战争的态度。

items.title: China to ban drone sales in Beijing citing security concerns
items.summary: Drone users will also be required to register their devices and secure permits before flying them.
items.title_zh: 中国以安全考虑为由禁止在北京销售无人机
items.summary_zh: 无人机用户还需要在飞行前注册其设备并获得许可。

items.title: Jewish agency warned of 'high' threat level ahead of Bondi shooting, report finds
items.summary: Gun reforms should be prioritised and policing around Jewish events increased, royal commission says.
items.title_zh: 报告发现，犹太机构在邦迪枪击事件前发出“高”威胁级别警告
items.summary_zh: 皇家委员会表示，应优先考虑枪支改革，并加强对犹太事件的监管。

items.title: Attacks on Jewish Targets in Europe Hint at Ripple Effects of War
items.summary: Officials are investigating similar attacks across Europe, all claimed by a shadowy Islamist group that may be using low-cost, unsophisticated methods to sow fear in Jewish communities.
items.title_zh: 对欧洲犹太目标的袭击暗示战争的连锁反应
items.summary_zh: 官员们正在调查欧洲各地发生的类似袭击事件，所有袭击均由一个神秘的伊斯兰组织负责，该组织可能正在使用低成本、简单的方法在犹太社区散布恐惧。

items.title: What to Know About the Stabbing Attack Against 2 Jewish Men in London
items.summary: The British police said the attack on Wednesday was being treated as terrorism, and they warned of rising antisemitic hate crimes.
items.title_zh: 关于伦敦两名犹太男子的持刀袭击事件，您需要了解什么
items.summary_zh: 英国警方表示，周三的袭击被视为恐怖主义，并警告反犹太仇恨犯罪不断增加。

items.title: Police in Australia Were Warned of Terror Risk Before Bondi Attack, Report Says
items.summary: A Jewish security group told police an attack on the community was “likely” because of heightened antisemitism, days before December’s mass shooting in Sydney.
items.title_zh: 报告称，邦迪袭击前澳大利亚警方收到恐怖风险警告
items.summary_zh: 一个犹太安全组织告诉警方，在 12 月悉尼大规模枪击事件发生前几天，反犹太主义情绪高涨，该社区“很可能”遭到袭击。

items.title: How the War in Iran is Affecting Africa’s Economy and Fuel Supply
items.summary: Despite the fragile cease-fire in the Middle East, many Africans say they are bracing for tougher times ahead and making difficult decisions about the future.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争如何影响非洲的经济和燃料供应
items.summary_zh: 尽管中东停火协议脆弱，但许多非洲人表示，他们正在为未来的艰难时期做好准备，并对未来做出艰难的决定。

items.title: Banks push to slow stablecoin law as Agora races for charter
items.summary: U.S. banks are looking to delay landmark stablecoin legislation even as crypto firms like Agora push ahead.
items.title_zh: 随着 Agora 争夺特许权，银行推动放慢稳定币法律
items.summary_zh: 尽管 Agora 等加密货币公司正在推进，但美国银行仍在寻求推迟具有里程碑意义的稳定币立法。

items.title: Gemini secures Derivatives Clearing Organization license as it works toward full CFTC stack
items.summary: Gemini's Olympus unit received a key DCO license from the CFTC, enabling it to act as an in-house derivatives clearinghouse.

items.summary_zh: Gemini 的 Olympus 部门获得了 CFTC 颁发的关键 DCO 许可证，使其能够充当内部衍生品清算所。

items.title: North Korea accounts for 76% of 2026 crypto hack losses, with theft since 2017 topping $6 billion: TRM Labs
items.summary: North Korea-linked hackers stole $577 million in two April exploits, accounting for 76% of crypto losses in 2026, according to TRM Labs.
items.title_zh: 朝鲜造成 2026 年加密货币黑客损失的 76%，自 2017 年以来的盗窃金额超过 60 亿美元：TRM Labs
items.summary_zh: TRM Labs 的数据显示，与朝鲜有关的黑客在 4 月份的两次攻击中窃取了 5.77 亿美元，占 2026 年加密货币损失的 76%。

items.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
items.summary: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.

items.summary: Three new agentic safety and policy features integrated into Ads Advisor will help protect and streamline your Google Ads account.

items.summary_zh: Ads Advisor 中集成的三项新的代理安全和政策功能将有助于保护和简化您的 Google Ads 帐户。

items.title_zh: 在 Gemini 应用程序中创建个性化图像的新方法
items.summary_zh: Nano Banana 2 现在使用您的个人背景和 Google Photos 来创建反映您独特生活的图像。

items.title: The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab launches to shape the future of AI and quantum computing
items.summary: Building on a long-standing MIT–IBM collaboration, the new lab will chart the convergence of AI, algorithms, and quantum computing.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM 计算研究实验室成立，塑造人工智能和量子计算的未来

items.title: A faster way to estimate AI power consumption
items.summary: The “EnergAIzer” method generates reliable results in seconds, enabling data center operators to efficiently allocate resources and reduce wasted energy.
items.title_zh: 更快地估算 AI 功耗的方法

items.title: Bringing AI-driven protein-design tools to biologists everywhere
items.summary: Founded by Tristan Bepler PhD ’20 and former MIT professor Tim Lu PhD ’07, OpenProtein.AI offers researchers open-source models and other tools for protein engineering.

items.title: Bitcoin miner MARA to acquire Long Ridge in $1.5 billion Ohio gas plant deal
items.summary: MARA will acquire an Ohio natural gas plant operator for $1.5 billion, shifting from bitcoin mining to digital infrastructure.

items.title: Wasabi Protocol hit by more than $5 million exploit across multiple chains, security firms say
items.summary: Blockaid and CertiK said a compromised admin key was used to upgrade Wasabi Protocol contracts and drain funds.

items.title: Solving the “Whac-a-mole dilemma”: A smarter way to debias AI vision models
items.summary: A new debiasing technique called WRING avoids creating or amplifying biases that can occur with existing debiasing approaches.
items.title_zh: 解决“打地鼠困境”：消除人工智能视觉模型偏差的更智能方法
items.summary_zh: 一种名为 WRING 的新去偏技术可避免产生或放大现有去偏方法可能出现的偏差。

items.title: MIT scientists build the world’s largest collection of Olympiad-level math problems, and open it to everyone
items.summary: New dataset of 30,000-plus competition math problems from 47 countries gives AI researchers a harder test — and students worldwide a better training ground.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的科学家们建立了世界上最大的奥林匹克级数学问题集，并向所有人开放
items.summary_zh: 来自 47 个国家的 30,000 多个竞赛数学问题的新数据集为人工智能研究人员提供了更难的测试，也为世界各地的学生提供了更好的训练场。

items.title: Teaching AI models to say “I’m not sure”
items.summary: A new training method improves the reliability of AI confidence estimates without sacrificing performance, addressing a root cause of hallucination in reasoning models.
items.title_zh: 教人工智能模型说“我不确定”
items.summary_zh: 一种新的训练方法在不牺牲性能的情况下提高了人工智能置信度估计的可靠性，解决了推理模型中产生幻觉的根本原因。

items.title: Here's why surging oil prices may not derail the consumer trade
items.summary: Wall Street is already looking beyond Big Tech quarterly results.
items.title_zh: 这就是为什么飙升的油价可能不会破坏消费贸易
items.summary_zh: 华尔街的目光已经超越了大型科技公司的季度业绩。

items.title: SoFi CEO defends decision to hold guidance steady
items.summary: SoFi CEO Anthony Noto explained that the company declined to raise its full-year outlook due to macro uncertainty, not weakness in fundamentals.
items.title_zh: SoFi 首席执行官为保持指导不变的决定进行辩护
items.summary_zh: SoFi 首席执行官 Anthony Noto 解释说，该公司拒绝上调全年展望是由于宏观不确定性，而不是基本面疲软。

items.title: Startup Blockworks wants to become the crypto equivalent of Morningstar. How it plans to do it
items.summary: Blockworks wants to position itself as the main data provider for the world of digital assets in a bid to attract more investors to the asset class.
items.title_zh: 初创公司 Blockworks 希望成为加密货币领域的晨星 (Morningstar)。计划如何做
items.summary_zh: Blockworks 希望将自己定位为数字资产领域的主要数据提供商，以吸引更多投资者进入该资产类别。

items.title: 'How are we going to get back home?' Islamist group tightens blockade on Mali capital
items.summary: The blockade comes days after Mali's defence minister was assassinated in a series of nationwide attacks.
items.title_zh: “我们要怎么回家？”伊斯兰组织加强对马里首都的封锁
items.summary_zh: 这次封锁发生在马里国防部长在一系列全国性袭击中被暗杀几天后。

items.title: Police say they believe abducted child was murdered as body found in Outback
items.summary: The five-year-old girl was last seen on Saturday at an Aboriginal town camp near Alice Springs.
items.title_zh: 警方表示，他们相信被绑架的儿童是被谋杀的，尸体在内陆地区被发现
items.summary_zh: 这名五岁女孩最后一次出现是在周六，地点是爱丽丝泉附近的一个原住民城镇营地。

items.title: US charges Mexican governor and other leaders with aiding drug cartel
items.summary: The governor of Sinaloa, Rubén Rocha Moya, hails from the same party as the president of Mexico.
items.title_zh: 美国指控墨西哥州长和其他领导人协助贩毒集团
items.summary_zh: 锡那罗亚州州长鲁本·罗查·莫亚与墨西哥总统来自同一党派。

items.title: Israel intercepts Gaza flotilla near Crete and detains 175 activists
items.summary: Pro-Palestinian activists say 22 boats carrying aid for Gaza were illegally intercepted in international waters near the Greek island.
items.title_zh: 以色列在克里特岛附近拦截加沙船队并拘留 175 名活动人士
items.summary_zh: 亲巴勒斯坦活动人士称，22艘向加沙运送援助物资的船只在希腊岛附近的国际水域被非法拦截。

items.title: 'I did not expect it': Kenya's Sabastian Sawe welcomed home with jubilant celebrations
items.summary: The first man to run a marathon in under two hours in a competitive race received a hero's welcome from supporters and family when he arrived home.
items.title_zh: “我没想到”：肯尼亚的萨巴斯蒂安·萨维以欢腾的庆祝活动欢迎回家
items.summary_zh: 第一个在竞技比赛中在两小时内跑完马拉松的人回到家时受到了支持者和家人英雄般的欢迎。

items.title: US singer D4vd bought tools online to dispose of girl's body, prosecutors allege
items.summary: The Tiktok star's attorneys have maintained his innocence and vowed to "vigorously defend" him.
items.title_zh: 检察官指控美国歌手 D4vd 在网上购买工具处理女孩尸体
items.summary_zh: 这位抖音明星的律师坚称他无罪，并誓言“大力捍卫”他。

items.title: Iranians Live With Pain and Powerlessness, Beneath a Smooth Veneer
items.summary: After months of upheaval, many are attempting to get on with their lives while quietly grappling with grief, economic stress and a loss of hope.
items.title_zh: 伊朗人在光滑的外表下生活在痛苦和无力之中
items.summary_zh: 经过几个月的动荡后，许多人试图继续自己的生活，同时默默地与悲伤、经济压力和失去希望作斗争。

items.title: Mother Runs for Office in India After Daughter Was Raped and Killed
items.summary: Ratna Debnath is a candidate for Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s party, which is campaigning on women’s safety in an Indian state election.
items.title_zh: 女儿被强奸和杀害后，母亲竞选印度公职
items.summary_zh: 拉特纳·德布纳特 (Ratna Debnath) 是总理纳伦德拉·莫迪 (Narendra Modi) 所在政党的候选人，该政党正在印度州选举中宣传妇女安全。

items.title: Iceland’s Pools and Hot Tubs Are Now UNESCO-Recognized. Some Locals Aren’t Thrilled.
items.summary: Iceland’s swimming pools and hot tubs serve as hubs of social life, a cultural distinction recently honored by UNESCO. Some Icelanders aren’t so thrilled.
items.title_zh: 冰岛的泳池和热水浴缸现已获得联合国教科文组织的认可。一些当地人并不兴奋。
items.summary_zh: 冰岛的游泳池和热水浴缸是社会生活的中心，这是联合国教科文组织最近认可的文化特色。一些冰岛人并不那么兴奋。

items.title: Israel Intercepts Aid Flotilla Heading to Breach Naval Blockade of Gaza
items.summary: Activists said the Israeli military boarded and disabled boats carrying humanitarian assistance to the territory in international waters near Greece.
items.title_zh: 以色列拦截前往突破加沙海军封锁的援助船队
items.summary_zh: 活动人士称，以色列军队在希腊附近的国际水域登上并摧毁了向该领土运送人道主义援助物资的船只。

items.title: Ukraine Reacts With Shrug to Phone Call Between Trump and Putin
items.summary: More than a year of similar conversations have failed to bring the country any closer to peace, so Ukrainians have stopped hoping they will.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰对特朗普与普京的通话耸耸肩
items.summary_zh: 一年多来的类似对话未能让该国更接近和平，因此乌克兰人不再抱有希望。

items.title: Trump May Pull Troops From Germany. That Isn’t as Scary as It Once Was.
items.summary: Germany has hugely increased its military spending, aiming to be less dependent on Washington. Its support for U.S. attacks on Iran may also give it leverage.
items.title_zh: 特朗普可能从德国撤军。这并不像以前那么可怕。
items.summary_zh: 德国大幅增加了军费开支，旨在减少对华盛顿的依赖。它对美国袭击伊朗的支持也可能为其带来影响力。

items.title: Coinbase's asset manager to offer stablecoin credit fund with tokenized share class
items.summary: The fund, dubbed CUSHY, targets yield from onchain lending and private credit, offering tokenized access through Superstate for institutional investors.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 的资产管理公司将提供具有代币化股票类别的稳定币信贷基金
items.summary_zh: 该基金被称为 CUSHY，目标是链上借贷和私人信贷的收益，通过 Superstate 为机构投资者提供代币化的投资机会。

items.title: MARA Holdings to buy Long Ridge Energy in $1.5 billion AI data center push
items.summary: The deal includes a 505 MW gas plant and 1,600 acres in Ohio, offering over 1 GW power capacity for future AI and IT buildout.
items.title_zh: MARA Holdings 斥资 15 亿美元收购 Long Ridge Energy 推动人工智能数据中心发展
items.summary_zh: 该交易包括俄亥俄州一座 505 兆瓦的天然气发电厂和 1,600 英亩的土地，为未来的人工智能和 IT 建设提供超过 1 吉瓦的电力容量。

items.title: Germany’s AllUnity expands EURAU to Solana as euro stablecoins gain traction
items.summary: The firm's MiCA-compliant euro token aims to speed up euro transfers and support regulated onchain finance as the euro stablecoin market doubled since early 2025.
items.title_zh: 随着欧元稳定币受到关注，德国 AllUnity 将 EURAU 扩展到 Solana
items.summary_zh: 随着欧元稳定币市场自 2025 年初以来翻了一番，该公司符合 MiCA 的欧元代币旨在加快欧元转移并支持受监管的链上金融。

items.title: Wasabi Protocol drained of $4.5 million in apparent admin key compromise
items.summary: The exploit used a playbook similar to Drift's $285 million breach earlier this month: a compromised deployer key with no timelock or multisig that drained funds.
items.title_zh: Wasabi 协议因明显的管理密钥泄露而损失 450 万美元
items.summary_zh: 该漏洞利用的剧本与本月早些时候 Drift 造成的 2.85 亿美元泄露事件类似：一个没有时间锁或多重签名的受损部署者密钥，从而耗尽了资金。

items.title: MegaETH token goes live as major exchanges open MEGA trading
items.summary: MegaETH’s MEGA token went live on April 30, completing a seven-day countdown triggered after the project hit its first KPI with 10 live apps.
items.title_zh: 随着主要交易所开放 MEGA 交易，MegaETH 代币上线
items.summary_zh: MegaETH 的 MEGA 代币于 4 月 30 日上线，完成了该项目在 10 个上线应用程序达到第一个 KPI 后触发的 7 天倒计时。

items.title: South Korea seeks 20-year term for Delio CEO in $169 million crypto case: report
items.summary: South Korean prosecutors seek 20 years for Delio CEO over $168.8 million embezzlement from 2,800 crypto deposit users.
items.title_zh: 韩国在价值 1.69 亿美元的加密案件中寻求 Delio 首席执行官 20 年任期：报告
items.summary_zh: 韩国检察官因从 2,800 名加密货币存款用户贪污 1.688 亿美元而寻求对 Delio 首席执行官 20 年监禁。

items.title: Stablecoin fintech KAST appoints former SEC advisor to lead policy communications
items.summary: KAST said Stephanie Allen will bolster KAST's public profile and reputation among policymakers, thought leaders, and media.
items.title_zh: 稳定币金融科技 KAST 任命前 SEC 顾问领导政策沟通
items.summary_zh: KAST 表示，Stephanie Allen 将提升 KAST 在政策制定者、思想领袖和媒体中的公众形象和声誉。

items.title: Building the compute infrastructure for the Intelligence Age
items.summary: OpenAI scales Stargate to build the compute infrastructure powering AGI, adding new data center capacity to meet growing AI demand.
items.title_zh: 构建智能时代的计算基础设施
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 扩展 Stargate 以构建支持 AGI 的计算基础设施，增加新的数据中心容量以满足不断增长的 AI 需求。

items.title: Cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age
items.summary: OpenAI outlines a five-part action plan for strengthening cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age, focused on democratizing AI-powered cyber defense and protecting critical systems.
items.title_zh: 智能时代的网络安全
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 概述了一个由五部分组成的行动计划，旨在加强智能时代的网络安全，重点是实现人工智能驱动的网络防御的民主化和保护关键系统。

items.title: An open-source spec for orchestration: Symphony
items.summary: Learn how Symphony, an open-source spec for Codex orchestration, turns issue trackers into always-on agent systems—boosting engineering output and reducing context switching.
items.title_zh: 编排的开源规范：Symphony
items.summary_zh: 了解 Symphony（Codex 编排的开源规范）如何将问题跟踪器转变为始终在线的代理系统，从而提高工程输出并减少上下文切换。

items.title: Choco automates food distribution with AI agents
items.summary: How Choco used OpenAI APIs to streamline food distribution, boost productivity, and unlock growth—an in-depth customer story on real-world AI impact.
items.title_zh: Choco 通过 AI 代理实现食品配送自动化
items.summary_zh: Choco 如何使用 OpenAI API 简化食品配送、提高生产力并实现增长——关于真实世界人工智能影响的深入客户故事。

items.title: Our principles
items.summary: Our mission is to ensure that AGI benefits all of humanity. Sam Altman shares five principles that guide our work.

items.summary_zh: 我们的使命是确保 AGI 造福全人类。 Sam Altman 分享了指导我们工作的五项原则。

items.summary: Google is bringing back its 5-Day AI Agents Intensive Course with Kaggle and registration is open.

items.summary_zh: 谷歌将通过 Kaggle 重新推出为期 5 天的人工智能代理强化课程，现已开放报名。

items.summary: Organize your home and digital space with Gemini. Use AI-powered tips for cleaning schedules, inbox decluttering, seasonal chores.

items.summary: Google has been a proud part of Austria’s landscape for years, and today, we’re announcing our first data center in Kronstorf, generating 100 direct jobs. This facility …

items.title: Q&A: MIT SHASS and the future of education in the age of AI
items.summary: As the School of Humanities, Arts, and Social Sciences marks 75 years, Dean Agustín Rayo reflects on how AI is reshaping higher education and why SHASS disciplines continue to be central to MIT’s mission.
items.title_zh: 问答：MIT SHASS 和人工智能时代教育的未来
items.summary_zh: 在人文、艺术和社会科学学院成立 75 周年之际，院长 Agustín Rayo 反思了人工智能如何重塑高等教育，以及为什么 SHASS 学科仍然是麻省理工学院使命的核心。
